privacy-one-content: The Dubai Police Online Store is committed to safeguarding your privacy. This Privacy Policy details how we collect, hold, use, and protect your personal information in connection with our e-commerce platform. By using our website and purchasing products, you consent to the collection and use of your information as outlined in this policy.
privacy-two-content: We collect personal information necessary to process your orders, facilitate account creation, and improve your shopping experience. This includes, but is not limited to: your full name, email address, phone number, shipping and billing address, and transaction details.
privacy-three-content:
We use your personal data for the following purposes:

  1. Fulfilling and delivering your orders.
  2. Processing secure payments through our integration partners.
  3. Sending order confirmations, tracking links, and customer service updates.
  4. Analyzing website performance and user experience using analytical tools.
privacy-four-content: We implement state-of-the-art security measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. All payment processing is handled through secure, encrypted gateways compliant with international standard protocols and United Arab Emirates data security laws.
privacy-five-content: You have the right to access, edit, or delete your personal data stored with us at any time. You can manage this information directly through your account dashboard or by contacting our customer experience team for assistance.
privacy-six-content:
General Headquarters of Dubai Police
Al Twar, Dubai,
United Arab Emirates

Email: support@dubaipolice.gov.ae
